/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/ElectricStatusD.name: Bottled Lightning
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/ElectricStatusD.desc: Add 25% Status Damage and Electricity Status Chance to all weapons

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/OvershieldCap.name: Harden Up
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/OvershieldCap.desc: Increase Overshield cap by 50%. Kills grant 50 shields

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/EnergyOrbToAbil.name: Broadened Horizons
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/EnergyOrbToAbil.desc: On Energy Pickup increase Ability Range by 10% for 10s

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/HealingEffects.name: Emergency Medicine
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/HealingEffects.desc: All restoration effects by Orb pickups increased by 25%

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/PunchToPrimary.name: Punchcard
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/PunchToPrimary.desc: Add +1.5m Punch Through to primary weapons

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/GasChanceToPrim.name: Toxic Shot
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/GasChanceToPrim.desc: Add 30% Gas Status Chance to Primary and Secondary Weapons

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/RadiationProcOn.name: Psionic Feedback
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/RadiationProcOn.desc: On Damaged 10% chance to set off a 250 damage, 5m radius blast of Radiation on taking damage.

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/MeleeCritChance.name: Practiced Precision
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/MeleeCritChance.desc: +20% Melee Critical Chance (x2 for Heavy Attacks)

name.name: Dynamo Jump
name.desc: On landing from a bullet jump gain 50% Electricity Damage for 5s.

name.name: Frequent Flyer Benefits
name.desc: Reload Speed, Fire Rate, Casting Speed and Melee Attack Speed is increased by 100% whie airborne

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/AttackAndMoveme.name: Hit'N'Split
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/AttackAndMoveme.desc: Critical melee hits have a chance to increase attack and movement speed by 5% for 10s.

name.name: Static Buildup
name.desc: Each meter traveled grants 1  Electricity damage. Attacking consumes 10% of the accumulated charge.

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/MagnetStatusPul.name: Force of Attraction
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/MagnetStatusPul.desc: Magnetic Status Effects also pull in enemies within 1m per stack

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/MagnitizeWithin.name: Magnetic Menace
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/MagnitizeWithin.desc: Every 5th ability cast applies a Magnetic Status Effect to an enemy in front of you within 50m

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/PowerStrengthAn.name: Overpower
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/PowerStrengthAn.desc: Casting abilities increases Ability Strength by 2% and Ability Efficiency by -1% per unit of energy used by ability, for 5s. Capped at 150% Ability Strength and -75% Ability Efficiency

name.name: Sharing is Caring
name.desc: Every 10th ability cast makes the next one free for yourself and allies.

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/FinisherChanceP.name: Combo Killer
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/FinisherChanceP.desc: Combo Multiplier increases the chance of enemies being susceptible to finishers after a melee hit. 5% per multiplier Max 65% with Venka Prime

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/EnergyWavesOnCo.name: Combo Wave
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/EnergyWavesOnCo.desc: Upon gaining 7x combo multiplier all melee attacks fire off waves of energy

name.name: Heavy Javelin
name.desc: Heavy melee attacks trigger Radial Javelin with 3m range and 1000 damage scaling both with combo multiplier

name.name: Slice & Dice
name.desc: Melee slide attacks increase slide attack Critical Chance by 5%, slide speed by 20% and reduce slide friction by 10% for 10 seconds with each slide melee attack. Max 10 stacks.

name.name: Copy & Paste
name.desc: Create a spectral clone of a random currently active specter or companion every 125 energy spent

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/CompanionsRadia.name: Friendly Fallout
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/CompanionsRadia.desc: Attacks from Specters or Companions have a 25% chance to cause Radiation Status

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/CompanionsBuffN.name: More the Merrier
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/CompanionsBuffN.desc: Non-Tenno Allies within 20m all gain +5% Melee Attack Speed and +20% Fire Rate for each one in range

name.name: Redemptive Chance
name.desc: Killed enemies have a chance of reviving as allied specters at 1% chance per status stack. Lasts 30 seconds

name.name: Bad Medicine
name.desc: Health Orbs create a 10m wide explosion on pickup, damaging enemies. Gain +50 Armor for each enemy hit, for 30 seconds.

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/GenerateOmniOrb.name: Involuntary Transfusion
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/GenerateOmniOrb.desc: Weakpoint kills have a 25% chance to generate a Universal Orb

name.name: Powered Shields
name.desc: Energy Orbs grant +100 shields and Overshield.

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/OrbsDuplicateOn.name: Targeted Medicine
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/OrbsDuplicateOn.desc: Shoot Health Orbs to collect them. Health Orbs now have a 25% chance to duplicate on pickup

name.name: Cumulative Cartridges
name.desc: +1% Status Chance per shot until reload

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/RefundBulletOnS.name: Free Shot
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/RefundBulletOnS.desc: Triggering a status proc has a 10% chance to reload the triggering bullet into the clip

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/BlastEveryXShot.name: Have A Blast
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/BlastEveryXShot.desc: Every 10th shot adds 10  Blast stacks on hit

/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/GuidingMissiles.name: Tickshots
/Lotus/Upgrades/Calendar/GuidingMissiles.desc: Shots gain a 10% chance to fire a seeking projectile for each successful hit. Firing weapons reduces the chance by 5%
